extensionDescription.message: Bulk download supported Google Classroom attachments from one popup.

precheckFallbackNote.message: ClassGrab could not pre-check this Drive file, so it started the normal download flow.

driveConfirmationResolvedNote.message: Google Drive required a confirmation step; ClassGrab resolved it automatically.

driveConfirmationManualNote.message: Google Drive returned a confirmation page that ClassGrab could not resolve automatically.

downloadTrackingSaveWarning.message: $FILE$ started, but status tracking could not be saved.

manualConfirmationOpenError.message: Could not open manual confirmation for $FILE$: $ERROR$

selectAtLeastOneFile.message: Select at least one file to download.

classroomOnly.message: This extension only works on Google Classroom pages.

activeTabReadError.message: ClassGrab could not read the active tab. Try reopening the popup.

classroomConnectError.message: ClassGrab could not connect to this Classroom tab. Refresh the Classroom page, then open ClassGrab again.

unexpectedClassroomResponse.message: ClassGrab received an unexpected response from the Classroom tab.

refreshClassroomRetry.message: Refresh the Classroom page and try again.

noSupportedFiles.message: No supported Classroom attachment files found.

openClassPost.message: Open a class post, assignment, or refresh the page.

downloadVerificationWarning.message: $FILE$ finished, but ClassGrab could not verify the downloaded file type.

htmlDownloadWarning.message: $FILE$ downloaded as an HTML page. Open the original Drive file and use Download anyway.
